## Reviewer Checklist

- [ ] Change belongs in `azure-platform-modules`.
- [ ] No real tenant IDs, subscription IDs, regions, CIDRs, resource names, credentials, or environment-specific configuration are committed.
- [ ] No Terraform state, plan files, provider caches, or local override files are committed.
- [ ] No provider or backend configuration is added to reusable child modules.
- [ ] Module version impact is identified where applicable.
- [ ] Azure Verified Module adoption or composition was considered where applicable.
- [ ] Documentation is updated where contracts, behavior, ownership, or procedures changed.
- [ ] Security review is included where required.
